article.body_preview:
DHAKA, June 01, 2023 (BSS) - Finance Minister AHM Mustafa Kamal today said the government will focus on sustaining the economic recovery by successfully implementing the ongoing stimulus packages.

"We have completely overcome the effects of the pandemic. Therefore, in this budget, our aim will be to sustain the economic recovery by successfully implementing the ongoing stimulus packages," he said.

The minister said this while placing over Taka 7.61 lakh crore national budget for FY23-24 at the
